title: storage.datastore
description: A storage datastore's capacity/free/type (ADR-0115). The ONE pinned Facet of vSphere read breadth — demanded by the `datastores` View's facets selector (§1.1). Closed (additionalProperties:false) so drift is caught at the write path. capacity/freeSpace are bytes.

type.description: the datastore filesystem type (e.g. VMFS, NFS, vSAN)
